chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 1400 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Saad Salman Ghani, Advocate along with Applicant Mr. Shamsuddin Rajpar, D.A.G. The bail of applicant Muhammad Ilyas Rajput was dismissed by the trial court on the ground that he remained absent; therefore, he has preferred the instant bail before-arrest application. This bail before-arrest application is converted into protective bail. The applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of seven days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 2,00,000/- (Two Hundred Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Learned counsel submits that the earlier surety submitted on behalf of accused in the sum of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Hundred Thousand) while he was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail on 18.11.2025 may adjusted. Ordered accordingly. The applicant during the period of seven days shall surrender before the trial court. The trial court is requested to hear the bail application of the applicant on merits and decide the same in accordance with law. The Investigating Officer who is present in court has complained that the applicant has not joined the investigation. The applicant is directed to appear before the I.O tomorrow at 11:00 A.M. and answer all his questions and cooperate with him fully; in the event the I.O reports to the trial court that the applicant has not appeared before him, the trial court may dismiss his bail on this ground alone.

The Investigating Officer who is present in court has complained that the applicant has not joined the investigation. The applicant is directed to appear before the I.O tomorrow at 11:00 A.M. and answer all his questions and cooperate with him fully; in the event the I.O reports to the trial court that the applicant has not appeared before him, the trial court may dismiss his bail on this ground alone. Learned counsel says that the applicant does go to the I.O but nobody records his statement. The I.O has assured that proper investigation will be done. This Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
